options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_level
options.description: Level to reach to win the game.

options.name: locked_region_enforcement
options.description:
Kill: Run /kill upon entering any locked region.
Countdown: Run /kill after being in a locked region for a certain amount of time.
Lenient: No locked region enforcement.

options.name: locked_region_countdown
options.description: When using 'Countdown' enforcement, the number of seconds in a locked region until /kill is run.

options.name: starting_route
options.description:
How much of the route from Ragni to Detlas to start unlocked
None: Only Ragni starts unlocked (may lead to fill errors)
Alekin: The route from Ragni -> Alekin starts unlocked
Hybrid: Same as Alekin option and the rest of the route to Detlas is guaranteed to be in sphere 1
Detlas: The route from Ragni -> Detlas starts unlocked

options.name: level_increment
options.description:
How many levels each max level item increases by.
Set this higher if you disable a lot of checks.

options.name: extra_max_levels
options.description:
Number of filler items to convert to extra max level items.
This should make it easier to get all max levels needed to win, as well as reducing how much you get stuck.
Not all of these are guaranteed to be added, depending on item and location counts during generation.

options.name: gear_lock_mode
options.description:
Prevent gear from being used until it is unlocked
Full: Armor, Accessories, and Weapons are unlocked independently
Unified: All gear types are unlocked with a single item

options.name: single_gear_rarity
options.description: Whether to combine all gear rarities (unique, rare, legendary+) into a single progressive level

options.name: gear_level_increment
options.description: How much to increase max gear level each item

options.name: extra_gear_levels
options.description:
Number of filler items to convert to extra max gear level items per gear type (armor, accessories, weapons).
Not all of these are guaranteed to be added, depending on item and location counts during generation.

options.name: quest_checks
options.description:
Earn checks for completing quests.
Disabling this removes a lot of checks.

options.name: mini_quest_checks
options.description:
Earn checks for completing mini-quests.
Disabling this removes some checks.

options.name: cave_checks
options.description:
Earn checks for completing caves.
Disabling this removes a lot of checks.

options.name: dungeon_checks
options.description:
Earn checks for completing dungeons.
Disabling this removes some checks.

options.name: level_checks
options.description:
Earn checks for leveling up.
Disabling this removes a lot of checks.

options.name: territory_checks
options.description:
Earn checks for entering territories for the first time.
Disabling this removes a lot of checks.

options.name: trap_chance
options.description: Percent of 'Nothing' filler items to replace with traps.

options.name: freeze_trap_weight
options.description:
Relative weight of freeze traps.
Freeze trap: Freezes player movement.

options.name: daze_trap_weight
options.description:
Relative weight of daze traps.
Daze trap: Disables player attacks/spells.

options.name: blind_trap_weight
options.description:
Relative weight of blind traps.
Blind trap: Blacks out the entire screen.

options.name: kill_trap_weight
options.description:
Relative weight of kill traps.
Kill trap: Immediately kills the player.

options.name: trap_duration
options.description: Number of seconds for freeze, daze, and blind traps to take effect.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Complete: Slay Creatures of Nesaak Forest
Complete: An Iron Heart Part I
Complete: An Iron Heart Part II
Complete: The Order of the Grook

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: Complete: Slay Creatures of Nesaak Forest
Complete: An Iron Heart Part I
Complete: An Iron Heart Part II
Complete: The Order of the Grook

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: Complete: Slay Creatures of Nesaak Forest
Complete: An Iron Heart Part I
Complete: An Iron Heart Part II
Complete: The Order of the Grook

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
